subject: When is the full paper submission deadline?
body: Hello, could you confirm the exact full paper submission deadline and the timezone? I want to make sure I upload before the cutoff. Is it Anywhere on Earth?

subject: Abstract registration deadline question
body: Do I need to register an abstract before submitting the full paper, and what is the abstract deadline relative to the paper deadline?

subject: Camera-ready deadline for accepted paper
body: Our paper was accepted. When is the camera-ready deadline and what happens if we miss it for the proceedings?

subject: Rebuttal period dates
body: How long is the author response window after reviews are released? I want to plan the rebuttal with my co-authors.

subject: Requesting a deadline extension
body: Given the unusually tight timeline this year, would the chairs consider an extension to the submission deadline? Several colleagues feel the current cutoff is unfair.

subject: Page limit for the main track
body: What is the page limit for main track submissions, and do the references count toward that page limit?

subject: Which LaTeX template should we use?
body: Is there an official template for this year? Can we reuse last year's LaTeX style file or will that be desk-rejected?

subject: Anonymization for double-blind review
body: For the double-blind submission, how should we handle citations to our own prior work so the paper stays anonymized?

subject: Supplementary material size limit
body: Is there a size limit for supplementary material, and what file formats are accepted for the supplement?

subject: Question about our figures
body: A reviewer mentioned our figures were hard to read. We used color heavily — are there requirements about grayscale legibility or figure formatting we may have missed?

subject: Registration fee question
body: Is there a fee to submit a paper, and when do registration fees apply? Does at least one author need to register for the proceedings?

subject: Virtual attendance possible?
body: If our paper is accepted but we cannot travel, can we present virtually and still be included in the proceedings?

subject: Workshop vs main track
body: If our paper is not accepted to the main track, can we still submit it to a workshop? Do workshops have their own deadlines?

subject: How many papers can I co-author?
body: Is there a limit on how many papers I can co-author this year, and do co-authors have reviewing obligations?

subject: First-time submitter — general process
body: This is my first time submitting here. Could you point me to general information about registration and inclusion in the proceedings? I'm a bit lost.

subject: Too many papers assigned to review
body: I have been assigned far more papers than expected for review. The review load is unmanageable — can my area chair rebalance my assignment?

subject: Cannot see my assigned papers
body: I received a reviewer assignment notification but cannot access the assigned papers in the system. My reviewer account seems linked correctly.

subject: Need to decline some review assignments
body: Due to a family emergency I cannot complete two of my review assignments. How do I notify the area chair so the papers can be reassigned?

subject: Paper assigned outside my expertise
body: One of the papers in my assignment is far outside my expertise area. Should the area chair reassign it to a better-matched reviewer?

subject: Possible conflict on an assigned paper
body: I think one of my assigned papers is by a recent collaborator. I'm worried about a conflict of interest as a reviewer — what should I do about this assignment?

subject: Added as a co-author without my consent
body: I discovered I was added as a co-author on a submission without my knowledge or consent. This affects the authorship of the paper and I want it corrected.

subject: Dispute over author order
body: My co-authors and I disagree about the author order on our submission. The authorship order was changed without full agreement. How is this handled?

subject: Please remove me from the author list
body: I no longer wish to be on this paper. Please remove me from the author list; I did not consent to the final version being submitted.

subject: Missing co-author was omitted
body: A contributor who did substantial work was accidentally omitted from the author list. We need to add the author back before camera-ready with everyone's consent.

subject: Pressure to add a senior name
body: My advisor insists on being listed as an author although they did not contribute intellectually to this work. I'm uncomfortable — is this honorary authorship acceptable?

subject: Reporting suspected plagiarism
body: I believe a submission has copied text and figures from a published paper without attribution. I want to report this possible plagiarism with evidence.

subject: Possible dual submission
body: I think the same paper is under concurrent review at another venue. Isn't this a dual submission violation that should be investigated?

subject: Human subjects approval not disclosed
body: A submission uses human subjects data but does not mention IRB approval or consent procedures. Should this be flagged for ethics review?

subject: Reviewer may have breached confidentiality
body: A preprint appeared that seems to exploit an unpublished method from a paper under review. This looks like a confidentiality breach and a serious ethics issue.

subject: Review seems biased by hidden conflict
body: One review of our paper feels hostile and may reflect an undisclosed competitive conflict. I'd like the integrity of the process examined, not just the score.

subject: Withdraw our submission
body: We would like to withdraw our submission before decisions are released. The submission number is 412. Please confirm the withdrawal.

subject: Withdrawal after acceptance due to patent
body: Because of a pending patent conflict we must withdraw our paper even though it was accepted. How do we process a withdrawal after acceptance?

subject: Data deletion after withdrawal
body: After we withdraw, can we request deletion of our uploaded files and datasets from the conference servers per our institution's data governance?

subject: Withdraw one of two overlapping submissions
body: We have two overlapping submissions and want to withdraw one to comply with the rules. Submission 88 should be withdrawn; 89 should remain.

subject: Need to pull our paper over an integrity concern
body: We discovered an issue with a result in our paper and feel we must retract it. We want to withdraw the submission rather than risk an integrity problem.

subject: Cannot log into the submission system
body: I can't log in to the submission portal — my password reset email never arrives and I get an error. My account access seems broken.

subject: Upload error on final PDF
body: The submission system throws an error every time I try to upload our PDF. The upload fails at 90%. Is the submission system having issues?

subject: Portal shows the wrong title
body: The submission system is displaying the wrong title for our paper and I can't edit it. Who in support can fix this system glitch?

subject: Uploaded file is missing
body: After submitting, one of our uploaded files is missing from the system. The supplementary upload appears to have failed silently.

subject: System crashed right before the deadline
body: The submission system went down with an error in the final hour before the deadline and I could not upload. This portal failure cost us the cutoff — please help.
